title: Love And Deepspace Cancels Its New Love Interest After Fan Backlash
title_zh: 《爱与深空》因粉丝反对取消新角色恋情线

sentences.en: Shortly after developer Papergames announced the addition of Valko--a new love interest in the mobile action dating sim Love and Deepspace --the backlash from fans has spilled into the real world.
sentences.zh: 在开发商Papergames宣布在手机动作恋爱模拟游戏《爱与深空》中新增角色Valko后不久，来自粉丝的反对声浪已经蔓延到现实世界。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号的使用，插入语结构

words.meaning: n. 强烈反对，强烈反应

sentences.en: Now, Papergames is reversing course by canceling Valko's debut and pledging to focus on the five other love interests who are already in the game.
sentences.zh: 现在，Papergames已经改变决定，取消了Valko的登场，并承诺专注于游戏中已有的五位恋爱角色。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在进行时表示当前正在发生的变化，by doing sth.方式状语

words.meaning: phr. 改变决定，改变方向

sentences.en: "We recognize that we moved forward with the introduction of Valko before we were truly ready," reads the statement posted to Love and Deepspace's Instagram account.
sentences.zh: 发布在《爱与深空》Instagram账号上的声明写道："我们意识到在真正准备好之前就推出了Valko角色。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】引述句结构，主谓倒装（reads the statement）

sentences.en: "In doing so, we let down the players who have supported us from the start, and we also fell short of delivering the experience that players anticipating Valko deserved."
sentences.zh: "这样做我们辜负了从一开始就支持我们的玩家，也未能达到期待Valko的玩家应得的游戏体验。"
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时表示持续到现在的动作，fall short of doing sth.结构

mc_quiz.question: Why did Papergames decide to cancel Valko's debut?
options: A. Because they didn't have enough resources to develop the character.
B. Because fans strongly opposed the addition of a new love interest.
C. Because they realized they weren't ready to introduce Valko properly.
D. Because they wanted to focus on other game features instead.
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：查看声明中提到的关于准备工作的内容。

translation_task.en: "In doing so, we let down the players who have supported us from the start, and we also fell short of delivering the experience that players anticipating Valko deserved."
translation_task.zh: "这样做我们辜负了从一开始就支持我们的玩家，也未能达到期待Valko的玩家应得的游戏体验。"
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了英语中fall short of doing sth.的表达方式，以及现在分词短语作后置定语的翻译技巧。

quiz.question: Why did Papergames decide to cancel Valko's debut?
options: A. Because they didn't have enough resources to develop the character.
B. Because fans strongly opposed the addition of a new love interest.
C. Because they realized they weren't ready to introduce Valko properly.
D. Because they wanted to focus on other game features instead.
quiz.hint: 提示：查看声明中提到的关于准备工作的内容。

title: Xbox Devs Call For Worker Protections Ahead Of Likely Layoffs
title_zh: Xbox开发者呼吁在可能裁员前加强员工保护

sentences.en: Earlier this month, rumors began to spread about potentially massive layoffs coming to Microsoft's Xbox gaming division this summer.
sentences.zh: 本月早些时候，有关微软Xbox游戏部门今年夏天可能进行大规模裁员的谣言开始传播。
sentences.grammar: 【时态与情态】使用一般过去时描述已发生事件，'potentially'表示可能性

sentences.en: While the majority of those cuts don't appear to have happened yet, game developers under Xbox have come together to push for more layoff protections for their members.
sentences.zh: 尽管大部分裁员似乎尚未发生，但Xbox旗下的游戏开发者已经团结起来，为其成员争取更多的裁员保护。
sentences.grammar: 【让步状语从句】'While'引导的让步状语从句，表示尽管...

sentences.en: Members of the United Video Game Workers and representatives from workers at Microsoft's first-party studios--including Bethesda's parent company Zenimax, as well as Activision Blizzard--were present at a press conference conducted by the Communications Workers of America.
sentences.zh: 美国视频游戏工会成员以及微软第一方工作室的工人代表——包括贝塞斯达的母公司ZeniMax，以及动视暴雪——都参加了由美国通信工会举办的新闻发布会。
sentences.grammar: 【插入语】破折号之间的内容为插入语，提供补充信息

words.meaning: n. 工作室（studio的复数形式）

sentences.en: Collectively, they pushed for enhanced layoff protections for all Xbox workers, including advance warning of impending layoffs, temporary hiring freezes to give the remaining devs a chance to advance internally, and tw...
sentences.zh: 他们集体呼吁为所有Xbox员工加强裁员保护，包括提前预警即将到来的裁员、临时冻结招聘以让剩余的开发人员有机会内部晋升，以及...
sentences.grammar: 【并列结构】'including'引导的并列结构，列举具体措施

words.meaning: adj. 即将发生的，迫近的

mc_quiz.question: What specific protections are Xbox developers pushing for according to the article?
options: A. Higher salaries and better working conditions
B. Advance warning of layoffs, temporary hiring freezes, and internal advancement opportunities
C. Stock options and profit-sharing plans
D. Union recognition and collective bargaining rights
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章第二段明确提到了开发者们呼吁的具体保护措施。

translation_task.en: Members of the United Video Game Workers and representatives from workers at Microsoft's first-party studios--including Bethesda's parent company Zenimax, as well as Activision Blizzard--were present at a press conference conducted by the Communications Workers of America.
translation_task.zh: 美国视频游戏工会成员以及微软第一方工作室的工人代表——包括贝塞斯达的母公司ZeniMax，以及动视暴雪——都参加了由美国通信工会举办的新闻发布会。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了长句中插入语的处理技巧，以及专业名词的准确翻译。

quiz.question: What specific protections are Xbox developers pushing for according to the article?
options: A. Higher salaries and better working conditions
B. Advance warning of layoffs, temporary hiring freezes, and internal advancement opportunities
C. Stock options and profit-sharing plans
D. Union recognition and collective bargaining rights
quiz.hint: 提示：文章第二段明确提到了开发者们呼吁的具体保护措施。

title: Steam Machine Preorders Are About To Begin, So Of Course They're Already On eBay
title_zh: Steam Machine预售即将开始，当然它们已经出现在eBay上

sentences.en: The Steam Machine isn't even out yet, though Valve has begun sending out confusing emails about whether people are in the "queue" or on the "waitlist" for the device.
sentences.zh: 尽管Steam Machine尚未发布，但Valve已经开始发送令人困惑的电子邮件，询问人们是否在设备的"队列"中或处于"等待名单"上。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】though引导的让步状语从句，主句使用现在完成进行时

sentences.en: That hasn't stopped netizens from doing the inevitable, though: listing their reservations on eBay to make a quick buck.
sentences.zh: 然而，这并没有阻止网民们做不可避免的事情：在eBay上列出他们的预订，以快速赚钱。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】though置于句首表示转折，冒号后面解释前面的内容

words.meaning: adj. 不可避免的，必然发生的

sentences.en: If you head over to eBay—or GameBay (?), since GameStop really wants to buy the online marketplace —and search for the Steam Machine, you'll see a handful of postings for Valve's upcoming living room PC.
sentences.zh: 如果你前往eBay——或者GameBay（？），因为GameStop真的想收购这个在线市场——并搜索Steam Machine，你会看到一些关于Valve即将推出的客厅电脑的帖子。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】if引导的条件状语从句，破折号之间的插入语补充说明

sentences.en: The system is already expensive, running between $1050 and $1430 depending on the model, but these listings go for about double the regular price.
sentences.zh: 该系统已经很昂贵，根据型号不同价格在1050美元到1430美元之间，但这些挂牌价格大约是正常价格的两倍。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作伴随状语，but表示转折

sentences.en: The Steam Machine listings GameSpot has viewed so far are all for "confirmed reservations."
sentences.zh: GameSpot迄今为止查看的Steam Machine挂牌都是针对"已确认的预订"。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】定语从句修饰listings，引号表示特定术语

words.meaning: adj. 已确认的，已证实的

sentences.en: This means that the eBay seller received one of those perplexing emails...
sentences.zh: 这意味着eBay卖家收到了那些令人困惑的电子邮件之一...
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】that引导的宾语从句，省略了表示继续的省略号

words.meaning: adj. 令人困惑的，复杂的

mc_quiz.question: What are the eBay listings for Steam Machines primarily based on?
options: A. The actual devices that are already available
B. Confirmed reservations for the upcoming device
C. Marketing materials from Valve
D. Previous models of Steam Machines
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到eBay上的挂牌是什么类型的。

translation_task.en: If you head over to eBay—or GameBay (?), since GameStop really wants to buy the online marketplace —and search for the Steam Machine, you'll see a handful of postings for Valve's upcoming living room PC.
translation_task.zh: 如果你前往eBay——或者GameBay（？），因为GameStop真的想收购这个在线市场——并搜索Steam Machine，你会看到一些关于Valve即将推出的客厅电脑的帖子。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了破折号之间的插入语翻译和专有名词的处理方式。

quiz.question: What are the eBay listings for Steam Machines primarily based on?
options: A. The actual devices that are already available
B. Confirmed reservations for the upcoming device
C. Marketing materials from Valve
D. Previous models of Steam Machines
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到eBay上的挂牌是什么类型的。

title: Steam Machine Preorders Are About To Begin, So Of Course They're Already on eBay
title_zh: Steam Machine预售即将开始，当然它们已经出现在eBay上

sentences.en: The Steam Machine isn't even out yet, though Valve has begun sending out confusing emails about whether people are in the "queue" or on the "waitlist" for the device.
sentences.zh: 尽管Steam Machine尚未发布，但Valve已经开始发送令人困惑的电子邮件，告知人们他们是否在该设备的"队列"中或处于"等待名单"上。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】though引导的让步状语从句，表示尽管；引号用于表示特定术语。

sentences.en: That hasn't stopped netizens from doing the inevitable, though: listing their reservations on eBay to make a quick buck.
sentences.zh: 然而，这并没有阻止网民们做不可避免的事情：在eBay上列出他们的预订，以快速赚钱。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】though位于句首表示转折；冒号用于引出解释；make a quick buck是习语，表示快速赚钱。

words.meaning: adj. 不可避免的，必然发生的

sentences.en: If you head over to eBay—or GameBay (?), since GameStop really wants to buy the online marketplace —and search for the Steam Machine, you'll see a handful of postings for Valve's upcoming living room PC.
sentences.zh: 如果你前往eBay——或者GameBay（？），因为GameStop真的想收购这个在线市场——并搜索Steam Machine，你会看到一些关于Valve即将推出的客厅电脑的帖子。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】if引导的条件状语从句；破折号之间的内容是插入语；you'll see是将来时。

sentences.en: The system is already expensive, running between $1050 and $1430 depending on the model, but these listings go for about double the regular price.
sentences.zh: 该系统已经很昂贵，根据型号不同价格在1050美元到1430美元之间，但这些挂牌价格大约是常规价格的两倍。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作伴随状语；but表示转折；go for表示售价为。

mc_quiz.question: Why are people listing their Steam Machine reservations on eBay?
options: A. Because they don't want the product anymore
B. To make a quick profit
C. Because Valve asked them to
D. Because the system is defective
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了人们这样做的原因，与快速赚钱有关。

translation_task.en: If you head over to eBay—or GameBay (?), since GameStop really wants to buy the online marketplace —and search for the Steam Machine, you'll see a handful of postings for Valve's upcoming living room PC.
translation_task.zh: 如果你前往eBay——或者GameBay（？），因为GameStop真的想收购这个在线市场——并搜索Steam Machine，你会看到一些关于Valve即将推出的客厅电脑的帖子。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了包含插入语和条件状语从句的复杂句翻译，以及专有名词的处理。

quiz.question: Why are people listing their Steam Machine reservations on eBay?
options: A. Because they don't want the product anymore
B. To make a quick profit
C. Because Valve asked them to
D. Because the system is defective
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了人们这样做的原因，与快速赚钱有关。

title: Europe is pushing back on Washington's chip war
title_zh: 欧洲对华盛顿的芯片战争发起反击

sentences.en: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.
sentences.zh: 正如ASML首席执行官克里斯托夫·福凯在5月告诉TechCrunch的那样，中国目前能够购买的是老一代深紫外光工具——这些设备大约在十年前首次发货——而这些正是《MATCH法案》现在将禁止的机器。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】本句使用了复杂的主语从句和插入语结构，包含破折号补充说明。

words.meaning: adj. 禁止进入的，禁止使用的

mc_quiz.question: According to the article, what type of chip-making equipment can China currently purchase?
options: A. State-of-the-art extreme ultraviolet lithography machines
B. Older-generation deep ultraviolet tools
C. Next-generation semiconductor fabrication equipment
D. Advanced quantum computing processors
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章明确提到中国目前能购买的是哪一代设备，以及这些设备何时首次发货。

translation_task.en: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.
translation_task.zh: 正如ASML首席执行官克里斯托夫·福凯在5月告诉TechCrunch的那样，中国目前能够购买的是老一代深紫外光工具——这些设备大约在十年前首次发货——而这些正是《MATCH法案》现在将禁止的机器。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了复杂长句的翻译技巧，包括处理插入语、破折号补充说明以及专业术语的准确翻译。

quiz.question: According to the article, what type of chip-making equipment can China currently purchase?
options: A. State-of-the-art extreme ultraviolet lithography machines
B. Older-generation deep ultraviolet tools
C. Next-generation semiconductor fabrication equipment
D. Advanced quantum computing processors
quiz.hint: 提示：文章明确提到中国目前能购买的是哪一代设备，以及这些设备何时首次发货。

title: Xbox Series S, The "Cheap" Option, Now Costs As Much As Series X Did Six Years Ago
title_zh: Xbox Series S，这款"廉价"选项，现在的价格与六年前Series X首发时相同

sentences.en: When Xbox Series S launched alongside Series X and PS5, it presented a compelling argument: Play all of the same games as elsewhere, albeit with lesser performance and visuals, for way cheaper.
sentences.zh: 当Xbox Series S与Series X和PS5同时发布时，它提出了一个令人信服的论点：以便宜得多的价格玩到所有与其他平台相同的游戏，尽管性能和视觉效果较差。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】although引导的让步状语从句，破折号后的补充说明结构

words.meaning: adj. 令人信服的，引人入胜的

sentences.en: $300 felt surprisingly reasonable, giving you a way to save $100 compared to the cheapest PS5 and $200 compared to the more premium PS5 and Series X models.
sentences.zh: 300美元的价格感觉出奇地合理，让你比最便宜的PS5节省100美元，比更高端的PS5和Series X型号节省200美元。

sentences.en: With the Series S turning six later this year, you'd expect it--like every other console--to get cheaper over time, as has always been the case.
sentences.zh: 随着Series S在今年晚些时候迎来六周年，你会期望它像其他所有游戏机一样随时间推移而降价，这向来是行业惯例。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】破折号插入语，as引导的定语从句

sentences.en: But this is 2026, baby. Welcome to hell.
sentences.zh: 但这是2026年，宝贝。欢迎来到地狱。

sentences.en: Beginning August 1, Xbox Series S will cost as much as Xbox Series X did at launch in November 2020 : $500.
sentences.zh: 从8月1日开始，Xbox Series S的价格将与2020年11月首发时的Xbox Series X相同：500美元。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】as...as比较结构，did替代cost避免重复

mc_quiz.question: What is the main point of the article?
options: A. Xbox Series S is cheaper than other gaming consoles
B. Xbox Series S price has increased significantly over time
C. Xbox Series S will be discontinued in 2026
D. PS5 is better value than Xbox Series S
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章重点讨论了Xbox Series S价格的变化情况，特别是与首发价格的对比。

translation_task.en: Beginning August 1, Xbox Series S will cost as much as Xbox Series X did at launch in November 2020 : $500.
translation_task.zh: 从8月1日开始，Xbox Series S的价格将与2020年11月首发时的Xbox Series X相同：500美元。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了as...as比较结构的使用，以及did替代cost避免重复的技巧，同时展示了时间状语的准确翻译。

quiz.question: What is the main point of the article?
options: A. Xbox Series S is cheaper than other gaming consoles
B. Xbox Series S price has increased significantly over time
C. Xbox Series S will be discontinued in 2026
D. PS5 is better value than Xbox Series S
quiz.hint: 提示：文章重点讨论了Xbox Series S价格的变化情况，特别是与首发价格的对比。

title: Anthropic's Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
title_zh: Anthropic的Claude标签正在通过Slack消息逐步了解您的公司

sentences.en: Anthropic's new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack.
sentences.zh: Anthropic的新Claude标签为Slack带来了一个全天候的AI队友。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作定语，'always-on'作为复合形容词修饰'AI teammate'

words.meaning: adj. 人类学的，与人类有关的

sentences.en: But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.
sentences.zh: 但除了提高生产力外，该功能是一项战略举措，旨在捕捉组织背景、机构知识和企业工作流程。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】'beyond'作介词短语表示'除...外'，'strategic play'是商业术语，'to capture'作目的状语

mc_quiz.question: What is the primary strategic purpose of Anthropic's Claude Tag feature?
options: A. To increase individual productivity
B. To capture organizational context and knowledge
C. To replace human teammates in Slack
D. To provide customer support
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章第二句明确指出了该功能的战略目的，请仔细阅读'But beyond productivity...'后面的内容。

translation_task.en: But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.
translation_task.zh: 但除了提高生产力外，该功能是一项战略举措，旨在捕捉组织背景、机构知识和企业工作流程。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了'beyond'的引申义表达，以及'capture'在商业语境中的特殊含义，同时处理了三个并列名词短语的翻译。

quiz.question: What is the primary strategic purpose of Anthropic's Claude Tag feature?
options: A. To increase individual productivity
B. To capture organizational context and knowledge
C. To replace human teammates in Slack
D. To provide customer support
quiz.hint: 提示：文章第二句明确指出了该功能的战略目的，请仔细阅读'But beyond productivity...'后面的内容。

title: Sonic's New Chaos Hunt Game Includes Some Fine Print You Shouldn't Skip
title_zh: 索尼克新游戏《混沌狩猎》包含不应忽视的细则

sentences.en: The 35th anniversary of Sonic the Hedgehog is arriving later this year, and one of the ways that Sega is celebrating the event is a new ARG game called Chaos Hunt.
sentences.zh: 刺猬索尼克35周年庆典将于今年晚些时候举行，世嘉庆祝这一活动的方式之一是一款名为《混沌狩猎》的新ARG游戏。
sentences.grammar: 【复合句】包含两个并列分句，由and连接，描述了两个相关事实。

sentences.en: Fans have been invited to hunt for some missing Chaos Emeralds, but players should probably check out the fine print before they take part in it.
sentences.zh: 粉丝们被邀请去寻找一些失踪的混沌翡翠，但玩家在参与前最好先查看细则。
sentences.grammar: 【复合句】包含由but连接的两个转折关系的分句，使用了现在完成时被动语态。

words.meaning: n. 细则，小字印刷的条款

sentences.en: As noted by user Luna Leo on social media, the terms of service for Chaos Hunt requires players to agree to AI model training and to sharing their details with third-party AI vendors.
sentences.zh: 正如社交媒体用户Luna Leo所指出的，《混沌狩猎》的服务条款要求玩家同意AI模型训练，并与第三方AI供应商共享他们的详细信息。
sentences.grammar: 【复杂句】包含由as引导的状语从句，主语是the terms of service，谓语是requires，后面接两个并列的宾语。

sentences.en: The terms note that "We use reasonable efforts to prohibit [third-party] providers from using any of your personal information for the purposes of developing and improving their AI models."
sentences.zh: 条款中写道："我们会尽合理努力禁止[第三方]供应商使用您的任何个人信息来开发和改进他们的AI模型。"
sentences.grammar: 【间接引语】包含一个直接引语，使用了引号，引语中包含目的状语for the purposes of...

mc_quiz.question: What do players need to agree to according to the terms of service for Chaos Hunt?
options: A. Sharing their gaming achievements with other players
B. Participating in AI model training and sharing details with third-party AI vendors
C. Paying additional fees for special in-game items
D. Creating their own content based on Sonic characters
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：请仔细阅读第二段第一句，其中明确提到了服务条款的要求。

translation_task.en: As noted by user Luna Leo on social media, the terms of service for Chaos Hunt requires players to agree to AI model training and to sharing their details with third-party AI vendors.
translation_task.zh: 正如社交媒体用户Luna Leo所指出的，《混沌狩猎》的服务条款要求玩家同意AI模型训练，并与第三方AI供应商共享他们的详细信息。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了英语中被动语态的使用（have been invited）以及复杂句式结构，特别是包含多个并列成分的句子翻译技巧。

quiz.question: What do players need to agree to according to the terms of service for Chaos Hunt?
options: A. Sharing their gaming achievements with other players
B. Participating in AI model training and sharing details with third-party AI vendors
C. Paying additional fees for special in-game items
D. Creating their own content based on Sonic characters
quiz.hint: 提示：请仔细阅读第二段第一句，其中明确提到了服务条款的要求。

title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open source AI lab
title_zh: SpaceX与开源AI实验室Reflection AI签署计算协议

sentences.en: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.
sentences.zh: Reflection AI将从2026年7月1日起至2029年，每月支付1.5亿美元，以立即获得位于田纳西州孟菲斯附近的SpaceX Colossus 2数据中心内Nvidia最新的GB300 AI芯片及相关硬件的使用权限。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】本句包含时间状语(beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029)和目的状语(for immediate access...)，结构复杂但清晰。

mc_quiz.question: What is the monthly payment amount from Reflection AI to SpaceX for the compute deal?
options: A. $150 million
B. $150 billion
C. $15 million
D. $1.5 billion
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了每月支付的金额，请仔细查找数字部分。

translation_task.en: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.
translation_task.zh: Reflection AI将从2026年7月1日起至2029年，每月支付1.5亿美元，以立即获得位于田纳西州孟菲斯附近的SpaceX Colossus 2数据中心内Nvidia最新的GB300 AI芯片及相关硬件的使用权限。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了长句中时间状语(beginning...through...)和目的状语(for...)的翻译处理，以及专业术语(compute deal, AI chips, data center)的准确翻译。

quiz.question: What is the monthly payment amount from Reflection AI to SpaceX for the compute deal?
options: A. $150 million
B. $150 billion
C. $15 million
D. $1.5 billion
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了每月支付的金额，请仔细查找数字部分。

title: AMD's FSR Upscaling 4.1 Comes To Older GPUs, Steam Machine And Xbox ROG Ally Support On The Way
title_zh: AMD的FSR 4.1技术支持旧显卡，Steam主机和Xbox ROG Ally适配即将到来

sentences.en: AMD has announced that owners of RDNA 3 GPUs can now enjoy the benefits offered by its latest version of AI-powered upscaling, FSR 4.1.
sentences.zh: AMD宣布，RDNA 3显卡的现在可以享受到其最新版本的AI驱动超分辨率技术FSR 4.1带来的好处。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在完成时态表示最近发生且持续影响现在的事件

sentences.en: This comes a few weeks earlier than its July estimate, with the promise for more devices down the line, too.
sentences.zh: 这项技术的发布比AMD七月份的预计时间提前了几周，并且未来还将支持更多设备。

sentences.en: FSR Upscaling 4.1 functions similarly to other upscaling technologies on the market, and comes much closer to the performance and quality of Nvidia's market-leading DLSS than previous iterations.
sentences.zh: FSR 4.1技术的功能与市场上其他超分辨率技术相似，但在性能和质量上比之前的版本更接近NVIDIA市场领先的DLSS技术。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】比较级结构，表示与竞争对手技术的对比

words.meaning: n. 迭代版本；更新版本

sentences.en: It's the same technology that underpins the PlayStation 5 Pro's PSSR 2, with Sony layering on its own work on top of what AMD has engineering here.
sentences.zh: 这项技术是PS5 Pro的PSSR 2技术的基础，索尼在此基础上添加了自己的工作成果。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】定语从句和with复合结构

sentences.en: The upscaling suite was previously exclusive to the company's latest GPUs, the RX 9070 and 9070 XT, but will now be available to many, many more RDNA 3 G...
sentences.zh: 这套超分辨率技术之前仅限于公司的最新显卡RX 9070和9070 XT，但现在将适用于更多RDNA 3显卡...
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】被动语态和对比结构

mc_quiz.question: What is the main advantage of FSR 4.1 compared to previous versions?
options: A. It's now available for more RDNA 3 GPUs
B. It offers performance and quality closer to Nvidia's DLSS
C. It will support Steam Machine and Xbox ROG Ally
D. It was released earlier than AMD's July estimate
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了FSR 4.1与竞争对手技术的对比。

translation_task.en: It's the same technology that underpins the PlayStation 5 Pro's PSSR 2, with Sony layering on its own work on top of what AMD has engineering here.
translation_task.zh: 这项技术是PS5 Pro的PSSR 2技术的基础，索尼在此基础上添加了自己的工作成果。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了定语从句和with复合结构的翻译，以及专业术语的准确表达。

quiz.question: What is the main advantage of FSR 4.1 compared to previous versions?
options: A. It's now available for more RDNA 3 GPUs
B. It offers performance and quality closer to Nvidia's DLSS
C. It will support Steam Machine and Xbox ROG Ally
D. It was released earlier than AMD's July estimate
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了FSR 4.1与竞争对手技术的对比。

title: Is the US government's Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
title_zh: 美国政府对Anthropic的禁令是否意外地帮助了这个品牌？

sentences.en: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5's guardrails.
sentences.zh: 就在上周即将结束时，美国政府迫使Anthropic撤回其两个最新模型Fable 5和Mythos 5，理由是国家安全问题，此前亚马逊研究人员 allegedly（据称）找到了绕过Fable 5防护栏的方法。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作状语，citing表示原因

sentences.en: Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models.
sentences.zh: 网络安全研究人员随后签署了一封公开信，称这一举动是危险的，而Anthropic本身也指出同样的越狱方法存在于其他模型中。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作后置定语，calling修饰letter

sentences.en: So is [...]
sentences.zh: 那么是否 [...]

mc_quiz.question: Why did the US government force Anthropic to pull its newest models?
options: A. Because the models were performing poorly
B. Due to national security concerns after alleged bypass methods were found
C. Because Anthropic violated cybersecurity regulations
D. As requested by Amazon researchers
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章第一段明确指出了禁令的原因，与国家安全和研究人员发现的绕过方法有关。

translation_task.en: Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models.
translation_task.zh: 网络安全研究人员随后签署了一封公开信，称这一举动是危险的，而Anthropic本身也指出同样的越狱方法存在于其他模型中。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了现在分词短语作后置定语的翻译技巧，以及并列复合句的处理方式。

quiz.question: Why did the US government force Anthropic to pull its newest models?
options: A. Because the models were performing poorly
B. Due to national security concerns after alleged bypass methods were found
C. Because Anthropic violated cybersecurity regulations
D. As requested by Amazon researchers
quiz.hint: 提示：文章第一段明确指出了禁令的原因，与国家安全和研究人员发现的绕过方法有关。

title: If You Haven't Reserved A Steam Controller Yet, You'll Have To Wait Until Next Year
title_zh: 如果你还没有预订Steam手柄，你可能要等到明年了

sentences.en: Last month, Valve launched its Steam Controller and demand has far outweighed the supply.
sentences.zh: 上个月，Valve公司发布了其Steam手柄，但需求远远超过了供应量。
sentences.grammar: 现在完成时与一般过去时的对比使用

sentences.en: So much so that as of today, new orders for Steam Controller won't be fulfilled by Valve until 2027 at the earliest.
sentences.zh: 情况如此严重，以至于截至今天，Valve最早要到2027年才能完成新的Steam手柄订单。
sentences.grammar: 结果状语从句与被动语态的结合使用

sentences.en: Valve shared the news on its site, where it noted that it has "no plans to stop making Steam Controller."
sentences.zh: Valve在其网站上公布了这一消息，并表示他们"没有停止生产Steam手柄的计划"。
sentences.grammar: 定语从句的使用

sentences.en: But the company also stated that the response to the controller has "exceeded our expectations."
sentences.zh: 但该公司也表示，消费者对该手柄的反应"超出了我们的预期"。
sentences.grammar: 宾语从句的使用

sentences.en: In the interest of clarity, Valve will now provide customers with three estimated delivery windows for Steam Controller based on when they placed their orders: September 2026, December 2026, and a vague 2027 that came with a promise for more specific info down the line.
sentences.zh: 为了清晰起见，Valve现在将根据客户下单的时间提供三个预计的交货窗口：2026年9月、2026年12月，以及一个模糊的2027年，并承诺稍后会提供更具体的信息。
sentences.grammar: 复杂句结构，包含多个修饰成分

sentences.en: Players who have already placed their orders can log into their Steam account to see their order window.
sentences.zh: 已经下单的玩家可以登录他们的Steam账户查看他们的订单交货窗口。
sentences.grammar: 定语从句的使用

mc_quiz.question: According to the article, when will Valve fulfill new orders for Steam Controller?
options: A. Immediately after placing the order
B. By the end of this year
C. Not until 2027 at the earliest
D. Only for customers who pre-ordered
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章明确提到了新订单的最早完成时间，请查找相关信息。

translation_task.en: In the interest of clarity, Valve will now provide customers with three estimated delivery windows for Steam Controller based on when they placed their orders: September 2026, December 2026, and a vague 2027 that came with a promise for more specific info down the line.
translation_task.zh: 为了清晰起见，Valve现在将根据客户下单的时间提供三个预计的交货窗口：2026年9月、2026年12月，以及一个模糊的2027年，并承诺稍后会提供更具体的信息。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了复杂长句的翻译技巧，特别是包含多个修饰成分和插入语的句子结构处理。

quiz.question: According to the article, when will Valve fulfill new orders for Steam Controller?
options: A. Immediately after placing the order
B. By the end of this year
C. Not until 2027 at the earliest
D. Only for customers who pre-ordered
quiz.hint: 提示：文章明确提到了新订单的最早完成时间，请查找相关信息。

title: Is the US government's Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
title_zh: 美国政府禁止Anthropic的行为是否意外地帮助了这个品牌？

sentences.en: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5's guardrails.
sentences.zh: 就在上周即将结束时，美国政府迫使Anthropic撤回其两个最新模型Fable 5和Mythos 5，理由是国家安全问题，此前亚马逊研究人员 allegedly 发现了一种绕过Fable 5防护栏的方法。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作状语，citing表示原因

sentences.zh: 网络安全研究人员随后签署了一封公开信，称这一举动危险，而Anthropic本身也指出同样的越狱方法存在于其他模型中。
sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作后置定语，并列结构

words.meaning: n. 越狱，破解（系统限制）

sentences.en: So is [...]
sentences.zh: 那么这是否 [...]

C. Because Amazon wanted to acquire Anthropic
D. Due to copyright infringement issues

translation_task.en: Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models.
translation_task.zh: 网络安全研究人员随后签署了一封公开信，称这一举动危险，而Anthropic本身也指出同样的越狱方法存在于其他模型中。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了现在分词短语作后置定语和并列结构的翻译处理。

title: Is the US government's Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
title_zh: 美国政府的Anthropic禁令是否意外地帮助了这个品牌？

sentences.zh: 就在上周即将结束时，美国政府迫使Anthropic撤回其两个最新模型Fable 5和Mythos 5，理由是国家安全问题，此前亚马逊研究人员 allegedly（据称）找到了绕过Fable 5安全护栏的方法。

sentences.en: Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models.

sentences.grammar: 【语法要点】现在分词短语作后置定语，calling...修饰letter

sentences.en: So is [...]

C. Because Amazon wanted to acquire Anthropic
D. Due to public complaints about the models

title: If You Haven't Reserved A Steam Controller Yet, You'll Have To Wait Until Next Year
title_zh: 如果你还没有预订Steam手柄，你可能要等到明年了

sentences.en: Last month, Valve launched its Steam Controller and demand has far outweighed the supply.
sentences.zh: 上个月，Valve公司发布了其Steam手柄，但需求远远超过了供应量。
sentences.grammar: 【现在完成时】表示过去发生但与现在有联系的动作

sentences.en: So much so that as of today, new orders for Steam Controller won't be fulfilled by Valve until 2027 at the earliest.
sentences.zh: 情况如此严重，以至于从今天起，Valve最早也要到2027年才能完成新的Steam手柄订单。
sentences.grammar: 【结果状语从句】表示前面情况的严重程度导致的结果

sentences.en: Valve shared the news on its site, where it noted that it has "no plans to stop making Steam Controller."
sentences.zh: Valve在其网站上公布了这一消息，并表示他们"没有停止生产Steam手柄的计划"。
sentences.grammar: 【定语从句】where引导的定语从句修饰site

sentences.en: But the company also stated that the response to the controller has "exceeded our expectations."
sentences.zh: 但该公司也表示，这款手柄的市场反响"超出了我们的预期"。
sentences.grammar: 【宾语从句】that引导的宾语从句作stated的宾语

sentences.en: In the interest of clarity, Valve will now provide customers with three estimated delivery windows for Steam Controller based on when they placed their orders.
sentences.zh: 为了清晰起见，Valve现在将根据客户下单的时间，提供三个预计的Steam手柄交付窗口。
sentences.grammar: 【介词短语作目的状语】In the interest of clarity表示目的

sentences.en: Players who have already placed their orders can log into their Steam account to see their order window.
sentences.zh: 已经下单的玩家可以登录他们的Steam账户查看他们的订单交付时间窗口。
sentences.grammar: 【定语从句】who引导的定语从句修饰Players

mc_quiz.question: When will Valve fulfill new orders for Steam Controller according to the article?
options: A. Immediately after placing the order
B. By the end of this year
C. At least until 2027
D. Only for existing customers
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了最早完成新订单的时间。

translation_task.en: In the interest of clarity, Valve will now provide customers with three estimated delivery windows for Steam Controller based on when they placed their orders.
translation_task.zh: 为了清晰起见，Valve现在将根据客户下单的时间，提供三个预计的Steam手柄交付窗口。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了介词短语作目的状语(In the interest of clarity)和过去分词作定语(based on when they placed their orders)的翻译技巧。

quiz.question: When will Valve fulfill new orders for Steam Controller according to the article?
options: A. Immediately after placing the order
B. By the end of this year
C. At least until 2027
D. Only for existing customers
quiz.hint: 提示：文章中明确提到了最早完成新订单的时间。

title: Why OpenAI Released GPT-6: The Future of AGI

sentences.en: OpenAI has released a new artificial intelligence model called GPT-6.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 发布了一个名为 GPT-6 的新人工智能模型。
sentences.grammar: 【现在完成时】has released 表示过去发生的动作对现在造成了影响（即新模型现在已经可用了）。

sentences.en: This model marks a significant step towards artificial general intelligence.
sentences.zh: 该模型标志着迈向通用人工智能（AGI）的重要一步。
sentences.grammar: 【动词短语】marks a significant step 结合介词短语 towards AGI，意为朝着 AGI 迈出了重要一步。

mc_quiz.question: What is the primary significance of the GPT-6 release according to the text?
options: A. It is OpenAI's cheapest model
B. It marks a significant step towards AGI
C. It is designed only for mobile phones
D. It replaces human programmers completely
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：关注文章中关于 GPT-6 与 AGI（通用人工智能）之间关系的阐述。

translation_task.en: This model marks a significant step towards artificial general intelligence.
translation_task.zh: 该模型标志着迈向通用人工智能（AGI）的重要一步。
translation_task.valuable_point:: 考察了名词短语 a significant step 以及介词 towards 的翻译处理。

title_zh: 为什么 OpenAI 发布 GPT-6：通用人工智能的未来

title: Tactical Depth: Inside the Swiss-System Brackets of Competitive CS2

sentences.en: The Swiss-system format has become a staple of competitive CS2 tournaments, creating high-stakes match-ups.
sentences.zh: 瑞士轮赛制已成为 CS2 职业比赛的常客，创造了极高悬念的强强对决。
sentences.grammar:: 【现在完成时】has become 表示过去开始并延续至今的动作或状态影响；分词短语 creating... 作伴随状语。

sentences.en: In this system, teams with identical Win-Loss records face each other in every round.
sentences.zh: 在此赛制下，每一轮中胜负战绩相同的战队都会相互交手。
sentences.grammar: 【主谓一致】teams with identical records 为复数，主语中心词为 teams，谓语动词为原形 face。

sentences.en: Team Spirit has dominated the scene, largely driven by the explosive entries of their prodigy, donk.
sentences.zh: Team Spirit 战队统治了赛场，这主要得益于他们的天才选手 donk 的爆发性突破能力。
sentences.grammar: 【过去分词短语作状语】driven by... 表示被动和原因，说明战队主导地位是由 donk 推动的。

sentences.en: His unparalleled mechanical skill allows him to secure space and break through solid defensive setups.
sentences.zh: 他无与伦比的枪法和操作控制力使他能够夺取空间并突破稳固的防守站位。
sentences.grammar: 【动词不定式】allows sb to do sth 意为允许/使某人能够做某事，to secure 和 break 为并列不定式后置。

words.meaning: adj. 无与伦比的，空前的

mc_quiz.question: What format has become a staple of competitive CS2 tournaments?
options: A. Single-elimination format
B. Round-robin format
C. Swiss-system format
D. Double-elimination format
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：寻找第一段中修饰 CS2 职业锦标赛主力赛制（staple）的那个复合词词组。

translation_task.en: Team Spirit has dominated the scene, largely driven by the explosive entries of their prodigy, donk.
translation_task.zh: Team Spirit 战队统治了赛场，这主要得益于他们的天才选手 donk 的爆发性突破能力。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了过去分词短语作状语 driven by... 表达的被动和原因关系。

title_zh: 战术深度：剖析 CS2 职业比赛的瑞士轮赛制

title: The Resonance of Chinese Indie Rock: An Analysis of 'Electric Girl'

sentences.en:: Chinese Football, an indie rock band from Wuhan, captures the nostalgic essence of youth through their melodic emo rock.
sentences.zh: 来自武汉的独立摇滚乐队 Chinese Football 通过他们充满旋律感的 emo 摇滚，捕捉到了青春的怀旧本质。
sentences.grammar: 【同位语】an indie rock band from Wuhan 作为主语 Chinese Football 的同位语进行补充解释。

sentences.en: Their instruments weave intricate guitar riffs, conveying both melancholy and warmth.
sentences.zh: 他们的乐器编织出复杂的吉他双声部旋律，传递着忧郁与温暖。
sentences.grammar: 【现在分词短语作伴随状语】conveying... 伴随谓语动作 weave 发生，表示伴随状态和结果。

sentences.en: The hit single 'Electric Girl' stands out for its driving bassline and bittersweet emotional expression.
sentences.zh: 热门单曲《霓虹甜心》因其动感十足的贝斯线条与苦乐参半的情感表达而脱颖而出。
sentences.grammar: 【介词短语表示原因】stands out for... 意为“因...而引人注目/脱颖而出”。

sentences.en: Listeners are instantly transported to a dreamlike city pop landscape filled with neon lights.
sentences.zh: 听众会瞬间被带入一个充满霓虹灯光的梦幻 City Pop 景象中。
sentences.grammar: 【过去分词短语作后置定语】filled with neon lights 装饰前面的名词 landscape，表示“被霓虹灯光充满的”。

mc_quiz.question: What kind of atmosphere does Chinese Football's single 'Electric Girl' project?
options: A. Cyberpunk and techno beats
B. Intense post-punk anger
C. Dreamlike City Pop filled with neon lights
D. Traditional folk storytelling
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：注意文章第二段最后一句关于霓虹灯（neon lights）和 City Pop 梦幻画面的描写。

translation_task.en: Chinese Football, an indie rock band from Wuhan, captures the nostalgic essence of youth through their melodic emo rock.
translation_task.zh: 来自武汉的独立摇滚乐队 Chinese Football 通过他们充满旋律感的 emo 摇滚，捕捉到了青春的怀旧本质。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了同位语作插入语的翻译整合以及 nostalgic 的词义处理。

title_zh: 中国独立摇滚的共鸣：解析《霓虹甜心》

title: Echoes of Independence: The Evolution of Indie Music Genres

sentences.en: During the 1980s, underground cassette cultures and independent record labels bypassed mainstream distribution channels.
sentences.zh: 在 20 世纪 80 年代，地下磁带文化和独立唱片公司绕过了主流发行渠道。
sentences.grammar: 【时间状语与并列主语】During the 1980s 作时间状语，cultures 和 labels 为并列主语，谓语 bypassed 意为“绕过”。

sentences.en: This DIY ethos allowed diverse genres like post-punk, dream pop, and lo-fi to flourish in obscurity.
sentences.zh:: 这种 DIY（自己动手）的精神让后朋克、梦幻流行和低保真等多种流派在默默无闻中蓬勃发展。
sentences.grammar: 【动词不定式】allowed sb/sth to do sth 允许某物做某事，to flourish 作宾语补足语。

sentences.en: The rise of digital streaming platforms has democratized music production, allowing independent artists to reach global audiences.
sentences.zh: 数字流媒体平台的兴起使音乐制作走向大众化，让独立艺术家能够触及全球听众。
sentences.grammar: 【现在分词短语作伴随状语】allowing... 伴随着主句的 has democratized 动作，表示其带来的影响与结果。

words.meaning: v. 使民主化，使大众化

mc_quiz.question: What allowed diverse music genres to flourish in obscurity during the 80s?
options: A. TV talent competitions
B. Massive corporate funding
C. The DIY ethos and underground cassette cultures
D. Strict copyright regulations
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：注意第一段提到的“DIY精神（ethos）”和“地下磁带文化（cassette cultures）”。

translation_task.en: The rise of digital streaming platforms has democratized music production, allowing independent artists to reach global audiences.
translation_task.zh: 数字流媒体平台的兴起使音乐制作走向大众化，让独立艺术家能够触及全球听众。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了动词 democratize (大众化) 翻译处理及现在分词作伴随状语的句型转换。

title_zh: 独立的回响：独立音乐流派的演变

title: Shift in Syntax: The Vibe Coding Workflow in the LLM Era

sentences.en: Software engineering is undergoing a tectonic shift, moving towards a paradigm known as 'vibe coding'.
sentences.zh: 软件工程正在经历一场剧变，向一种被称为“氛围编程（vibe coding）”的范式演进。
sentences.grammar: 【分词短语修饰与同位语】moving towards... 作伴随状语，补充说明 shift 的演进方向；paradigms 后面接过去分词作后置定语。

words.meaning: adj. 地壳构造的，剧烈的

sentences.en: In this era, developers specify system behaviors in natural language rather than writing boilerplate syntax manually.
sentences.zh: 在这个时代，开发人员用自然语言指定系统行为，而不是手动编写样板语法。
sentences.grammar: 【对比结构】specify... rather than writing... 意为“指定...而不是编写...”，rather than 后面接动名词作对比。

words.meaning: n. (编程)样板代码，常用模板

sentences.en: Instead of focusing on syntax errors, developers now act as system architects, orchestrating AI agents to assemble complex applications.
sentences.zh: 开发人员现在不再关注语法错误，而是充当系统架构师，编排 AI 智能体来组装复杂的应用程序。
sentences.grammar: 【介词短语前置】Instead of focusing on... 引入让步状语；orchestrating... 作为伴随状语，解释说明 act as system architects 的工作方式。

words.meaning: v. 编排，协调，管弦乐编曲

mc_quiz.question: How do developers work in the 'vibe coding' paradigm?
options: A. By writing raw assembly instructions
B. By specifying behaviors in natural language while AI generates code
C. By copy-pasting code from paper books
D. By avoiding computer systems entirely
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：关注第一段第二句，开发人员只需使用自然语言（natural language）描述系统行为。

translation_task.en: Instead of focusing on syntax errors, developers now act as system architects, orchestrating AI agents to assemble complex applications.
translation_task.zh: 开发人员现在不再关注语法错误，而是充当系统架构师，编排 AI 智能体来组装复杂的应用程序。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了 instead of (而不是) 让步关系处理以及 orchestrate (编排) 词义的技术化翻译。

title_zh: 语法切换：大语言模型时代的 Vibe Coding 工作流

title: Neon and Numbers: The Modern Business Rhythm of Shanghai Lujiazui

sentences.en: Shanghai Lujiazui stands as the financial heartbeat of China, where glitzy skyscrapers pierce the sky.
sentences.zh: 上海陆家嘴作为中国的金融心脉耸立，耀眼的摩天大楼直插云霄。
sentences.grammar: 【定语从句】where... 引导非限制性定语从句，在从句中作地点状语，修饰前面的 financial heartbeat (金融心脉/金融区)。

sentences.en: Every morning, millions of professionals navigate the underground metro lines to populate these vertical offices.
sentences.zh: 每天清晨，数以百万计的职场人士穿梭于地下地铁线，涌入这些垂直的办公楼宇中。
sentences.grammar: 【动词不定式】to populate... 作目的状语，表示他们搭乘地铁的目的。

sentences.en: Under the towering facade of skyscrapers, high-frequency trading and strategic decisions shape the pulse of global financial markets daily.
sentences.zh: 在摩天大楼高耸的外表下，高频交易和战略决策每天都在塑造着全球金融市场的脉搏。
sentences.grammar: 【介词短语修饰与主谓结构】Under the towering facade... 作为地点状语置于句首，主语为 trading and decisions，谓语为 shape。

mc_quiz.question: What daily activities shape the pulse of global financial markets in Lujiazui?
options: A. Traditional agricultural trade
B. High-frequency trading and strategic business decisions
C. Tourism and local handicraft selling
D. Residential housing construction projects
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：注意文章第二段关于“高频交易（high-frequency trading）”和“战略决策（strategic decisions）”的描述。

translation_task.en: Under the towering facade of skyscrapers, high-frequency trading and strategic decisions shape the pulse of global financial markets daily.
translation_task.zh: 在摩天大楼高耸的外表下，高频交易和战略决策每天都在塑造着全球金融市场的脉搏。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了 shape the pulse (塑造脉搏/节奏) 的意译以及 towering facade 的修饰语翻译。

title_zh: 霓虹与数字：上海陆家嘴的现代商业节奏

title: Global Leaders Announce Historic Carbon Reduction Treaty

sentences.en: At the international climate summit, representatives from over one hundred nations signed a historic treaty.
sentences.zh: 在国际气候峰会上，来自一百多个国家的代表签署了一份具有历史意义的条约。
sentences.grammar: 【介词短语作地点状语】At the summit 作为地点状语，主语为 representatives，谓语为 signed。

sentences.en: The agreement pledges to accelerate transition to renewable energy sources and phase out fossil fuels.
sentences.zh: 该协议承诺加速向可再生能源的转型并逐步淘汰化石燃料。
sentences.grammar: 【动词不定式】pledges to do sth 承诺做某事；and 连接并列的动词不定式 to accelerate 和 (to) phase out。

mc_quiz.question: What did the representatives sign at the climate summit?
options: A. A trade agreement for spices
B. A historic carbon reduction treaty
C. A local tourism promotion deal
D. A new technology licensing contract
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：第一段提到来自一百多个国家的代表在气候峰会上签署了一个 historic treaty（历史性的条约）。

translation_task.en: The agreement pledges to accelerate transition to renewable energy sources and phase out fossil fuels.
translation_task.zh: 该协议承诺加速向可再生能源的转型并逐步淘汰化石燃料。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了 pledge to do (承诺做) 以及 phase out (逐步淘汰) 的固定搭配和句型翻译。

title_zh: 全球领导人宣布具历史意义的碳减排条约

title: SpaceX Successfully Launches Next-Generation Satellite Constellation

sentences.en: The reusable rocket deployed sixty communication satellites into low Earth orbit.
sentences.zh: 这枚可重复使用的火箭将60颗通信卫星送入了近地轨道。
sentences.grammar: 【主谓宾结构】主语为 rocket，动词为 deployed，宾语为 satellites，后接地点状语 into orbit。

sentences.en: This mission aims to provide high-speed global internet access to remote regions.
sentences.zh: 该任务旨在为偏远地区提供高速的全球互联网接入。
sentences.grammar: 【不定式作宾语】aims to do sth 旨在做某事，to provide 作为 aims 的宾语补足方向。

mc_quiz.question: What is the primary goal of the satellite constellation mission?
options: A. To research soil quality on Mars
B. To provide high-speed global internet to remote regions
C. To build a giant telescope in space
D. To monitor underwater ocean currents
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：关注第二句中“provide high-speed global internet access to remote regions”（为偏远地区提供高速全球互联网服务）。

translation_task.en: This mission aims to provide high-speed global internet access to remote regions.
translation_task.zh: 该任务旨在为偏远地区提供高速的全球互联网接入。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了 aim to do (旨在做) 的翻译以及 internet access (互联网接入/访问) 的技术化词汇处理。

title_zh: SpaceX 成功发射下一代通信卫星星群

title: The Legacy of the Silk Road: Bridging Ancient Worlds

sentences.en: The Silk Road was not just a trade route for physical goods, but also a highway for ideas.
sentences.zh: 丝绸之路不仅是实体商品的贸易路线，也是思想交流的公路。
sentences.grammar: 【并列对比结构】not just... but also... 意为“不仅...而且...”，并列了 route 和 highway 两个表语。

sentences.en: It facilitated cultural exchanges between China, Persia, and the Roman Empire for centuries.
sentences.zh: 几个世纪以来，它促进了中国、波斯和罗马帝国之间的文化交流。
sentences.grammar: 【主谓宾结构】It (代指丝绸之路) 作主语，动词 facilitated 意为“促进”，后接介词短语 between... 作后置修饰。

mc_quiz.question: Besides trade goods, what did the Silk Road primarily transport?
options: A. Heavy military vehicles
B. Ideas and cultural exchanges
C. Modern financial stocks
D. Steam-powered engines
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：关注第一句的后半句“but also a highway for ideas”（也是思想交流的公路）。

translation_task.en: The Silk Road was not just a trade route for physical goods, but also a highway for ideas.
translation_task.zh: 丝绸之路不仅是实体商品的贸易路线，也是思想交流的公路。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了 not just... but also... 的句型翻译，以及 highway (公路/渠道) 在文化语境下的抽象化翻译。

title_zh: 丝绸之路的遗产：连接古代世界

title: Engineering the Empire: The Marvel of Roman Aqueducts

sentences.en: Ancient Romans built massive stone aqueducts to transport fresh water to bustling cities.
sentences.zh: 古罗马人建造了巨大的石质输水道，将淡水输送到繁忙的城市。
sentences.grammar: 【不定式作目的状语】to transport... 为动词不定式引导的短语，作目的状语，修饰谓语动词 built 的目的。

words.meaning: adj. 繁忙的，熙熙攘攘的

sentences.en: These gravity-powered structures showcased advanced hydraulic engineering skills.
sentences.zh: 这些靠重力驱动的结构展示了先进的水力工程技术。
sentences.grammar: 【过去分词作定语】gravity-powered 作为合成形容词（过去分词形式），作前置定语修饰 structures。

mc_quiz.question: How did Roman aqueducts transport water to cities?
options: A. By using high-pressure steam pumps
B. By relying on wind-powered turbines
C. By leveraging gravity-powered structures
D. By using deep electrical conduits
mc_quiz.hint: 提示：寻找第二句中修饰 structures（结构）的物理动力来源单词（gravity-powered）。

translation_task.en: These gravity-powered structures showcased advanced hydraulic engineering skills.
translation_task.zh: 这些靠重力驱动的结构展示了先进的水力工程技术。
translation_task.valuable_point: 考察了 gravity-powered (重力驱动的) 的合成词翻译以及 hydraulic (水力的) 专业词汇的精确表述。

title_zh: 帝国工程：古罗马高架输水道奇迹
